data.title: Anemoi taps Canaccord Genuity for Trasna reverse takeover fundraising
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Anemoi International Limited ( (GB:AMOI) ).

Anemoi International Ltd has appointed Canaccord Genuity Limited as Sponsor for its planned transfer to the Equity Shares (Commercial Companies) segment of the Official List and as Sole Bookrunner for fundraising linked to its proposed reverse takeover of the Trasna Group. The move underscores Anemoi’s progress on the transaction and its intention to raise advanced subscription funding to support Trasna’s expansion, following continued strong trading at Trasna and an increase in its order backlog from $98 million at the start of the year to $140 million, signalling growth momentum and potentially greater scale for the combined business.

The appointment of a high-profile Sponsor and Sole Bookrunner is a key step in executing Anemoi’s reverse takeover strategy and preparing the market-facing structure for the combined entity. For stakeholders, the strengthened order book at Trasna and plans to secure pre-completion funding suggest a focus on accelerating growth and providing the financial resources needed to capitalise on demand, while also tightening governance and regulatory alignment through the Official List transfer.

Spark’s Take on AMOI Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, AMOI is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held down by weak financial performance (declining small revenue, ongoing losses, and persistent cash burn). Technicals are a partial offset with price trading above key moving averages and a positive MACD, but valuation support is limited due to negative earnings and no dividend data.

To see Spark’s full report on AMOI stock, click here.

More about Anemoi International Limited

Anemoi International Ltd is a listed company on the London market, operating as an acquisition vehicle pursuing growth through corporate transactions, including reverse takeovers. Its strategy centers on identifying high-potential businesses, such as technology-focused groups like Trasna, and using capital markets fundraising to support their expansion and integration.

Average Trading Volume: 392,975

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

data.title: Arovella boosts board with four senior biotech and finance appointments
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Arovella Therapeutics Limited ( (AU:ALA) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Arovella Therapeutics has strengthened its board as part of a broader succession strategy, appointing seasoned Pharma and Biotech executive Dr Mike Perry as a Non-Executive Director. Dr Perry brings more than 30 years of global experience across biotech, pharma, medtech, cell and gene therapy, and venture capital, with a long track record in product development, regulatory approval, commercialisation, and public company governance.

The company has also appointed David Williams, Mark Diamond and Michael Thurn as Non-Executive Directors, following a skills evaluation and an engagement process with a significant shareholder that had previously issued, then withdrawn, a board-requisition notice. The new directors add deep expertise in capital markets, M&A, biotech leadership, licensing and partnerships, and drug development, potentially enhancing Arovella’s strategic capabilities and governance as it advances its iNKT cell therapy platform.

More about Arovella Therapeutics Limited

Arovella Therapeutics Limited is an Australian biotechnology company focused on developing its invariant Natural Killer T (iNKT) cell therapy platform. The company operates in the cell and gene therapy space, targeting innovative treatments based on immune cell engineering for high-impact medical applications.

Average Trading Volume: 952,362

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$93.08M

data.title: Latitude Raises A$134.6m via Capital Notes 2 as Hybrid Strategy Evolves
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Latitude Group Holdings Ltd. ( (AU:LFS) ) just unveiled an update.

Latitude Group Holdings has raised approximately A$134.6 million through the successful issuance of 1,346,455 Capital Notes 2 at A$100 each, with the securities expected to begin trading on the ASX under the code LFSPB on 29 April 2026. The offer included a reinvestment component, with more than A$64 million of existing Capital Notes 1 bought by a nominated purchaser and reinvested into the new Capital Notes 2, while the remaining Capital Notes 1 stay on issue and may be redeemed at Latitude’s option from late 2026.

The first distribution on Capital Notes 2, covering the period from 28 April to 28 July 2026, has been set at an annualised rate of 5.96239%, equating to a fully franked cash payment of A$1.4865 per note, with future distribution rates to reset quarterly. The capital raising strengthens Latitude’s funding base through hybrid capital, provides ongoing yield opportunities for noteholders and clarifies the company’s capital management approach by partially rolling existing hybrids into the new issue while retaining flexibility over the future redemption of earlier notes.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:LFS) stock is a Hold with a A$1.20 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Latitude Group Holdings Ltd. stock, see the AU:LFS Stock Forecast page.

More about Latitude Group Holdings Ltd.

Latitude Group Holdings is an Australian-listed financial services provider specialising in consumer lending and instalment payment products. The company focuses on unsecured personal loans, credit cards and retail finance solutions, targeting consumers and merchants across Australia and New Zealand.

Average Trading Volume: 70,762

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$977.3M

For a thorough assessment of LFS stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: SDCL Energy Efficiency Income Trust Completes Asset Disposal Amid Planned Wind-Down
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

SDCL Energy Efficiency Income Trust Plc ( (GB:SEIT) ) has shared an announcement.

SDCL Energy Efficiency Income Trust plc, a FTSE 250-listed specialist investor in energy efficiency infrastructure across North America, the UK and Europe, holds assets ranging from cogeneration and energy recycling to solar, storage and regulated gas distribution. The company is managed by Sustainable Development Capital LLP, a London-based investment firm focused on energy efficiency and decentralised generation projects worldwide.

The trust has completed the previously announced sale of a diversified portfolio of operational, income-generating energy efficiency assets, with the transaction finalised on 24 April 2026 under the terms outlined in March. This disposal comes as the company pursues a proposed portfolio sale and managed wind-down, to be decided by shareholders, marking a significant shift in its long-term strategy and signaling a transition phase for investors and counterparties in its projects.

Spark’s Take on SEIT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SEIT is a Neutral.

The score is primarily supported by strong financial positioning (debt-free balance sheet) and solid cash generation, but it is held back by high earnings/revenue volatility and weak technicals (price below major moving averages with negative MACD). Valuation is mixed: a very high P/E weighs on the score despite a very high dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on SEIT stock, click here.

More about SDCL Energy Efficiency Income Trust Plc

SDCL Energy Efficiency Income Trust plc is a FTSE 250-listed investment trust focused exclusively on the energy efficiency sector. Its portfolio spans North America, the UK and Europe, including cogeneration assets in Spain, U.S. commercial and industrial solar and storage projects, Swedish regulated gas distribution, on-site energy recycling for a major U.S. steel blast furnace, and a large U.S. business park district energy system. The trust is managed by Sustainable Development Capital LLP, a London-headquartered investment firm with global offices and a track record in energy efficiency and decentralised generation.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Prudential Cancels 449,197 Shares in Latest Buyback Move
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Prudential ( (GB:PRU) ) has shared an announcement.

Prudential plc has repurchased 449,197 of its ordinary shares from JP Morgan Securities on 27 April 2026 at an average price of £11.2415, with prices ranging between £11.18 and £11.38. The transaction was executed on the London Stock Exchange in line with shareholder authority granted at the 2025 AGM and under an existing arrangement with JPM.

The insurer intends to cancel the repurchased shares, reducing its total shares in issue and voting rights to 2,521,670,925, which becomes the new reference figure for regulatory disclosure thresholds. The buyback, conducted as an on-exchange and on-market purchase under UK and Hong Kong rules, underscores Prudential’s ongoing capital management strategy and may bolster earnings per share while modestly enhancing existing shareholders’ relative stakes.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:PRU) stock is a Buy with a £1470.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Prudential stock, see the GB:PRU Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on PRU Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PRU is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by moderate financial quality: a solid, improving leverage profile and restored profitability, tempered by pronounced earnings/revenue and cash-flow volatility (including a sharp 2025 FCF decline). Earnings-call guidance and shareholder-return plans are constructive and lift the outlook, while technicals are the main drag due to bearish momentum and the stock trading below key moving averages. Valuation is supportive given the low P/E, with a modest dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on PRU stock, click here.

More about Prudential

Prudential plc is a life and health insurance and asset management group focused on high-growth markets across Greater China, ASEAN, India and Africa. The group offers simple, accessible financial and health solutions and holds dual primary listings in Hong Kong and London, with additional listings in Singapore and New York via American Depositary Receipts.

The company is a constituent of the Hang Seng Composite Index and participates in the Shenzhen-Hong Kong and Shanghai-Hong Kong Stock Connect programmes. Prudential is not affiliated with U.S.-based Prudential Financial, Inc. or with The Prudential Assurance Company Limited, a subsidiary of M&G plc in the United Kingdom.

Average Trading Volume: 7,215,456

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £28.23B

data.title: Tullow Oil Strengthens Ghana Focus With Refinancing, Asset Sales and TEN FPSO Deal
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Tullow Oil ( (GB:TLW) ).

Tullow Oil reported 2025 full-year revenue of $847 million and average production of 40.4 kboepd, reflecting asset sales and lower output, but generated $99 million of free cash flow and trimmed net debt to $1.35 billion. The company completed disposals in Gabon and Kenya for $347 million, maintained high FPSO uptime in Ghana and saw profits from continuing operations remain under pressure, despite a modest overall profit after tax.

In early 2026, Tullow’s production rose to 43.4 kboepd, supported by new Jubilee wells and strong operational performance, with Ghanaian parliament ratifying extensions of the Jubilee and TEN petroleum agreements to 2040. The group agreed improved gas sales terms, moved to acquire the TEN FPSO to cut lease costs and boost synergies, increased cash flow guidance on the back of higher prices and performance, and secured a comprehensive refinancing that extends key debt maturities and bolsters liquidity for its Ghana-focused investment programme.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:TLW) stock is a Buy with a £0.35 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Tullow Oil stock, see the GB:TLW Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on TLW Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TLW is a Neutral.

The score is primarily constrained by significant balance sheet risk (negative equity/high leverage) despite strong operating cash generation. Technical indicators show improving near-term momentum, but longer-term trend signals remain weak. Valuation provides limited support due to a negative P/E and no dividend yield data.

To see Spark’s full report on TLW stock, click here.

More about Tullow Oil

Tullow Oil is an independent energy company focused on the responsible development of oil and gas assets, with core producing operations in Ghana. Listed on the London and Ghanaian stock exchanges under the ticker TLW, the group concentrates on high-value offshore fields such as Jubilee and TEN, having exited non-core positions in Gabon and Kenya to sharpen its strategic focus.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: £170.8M

data.title: Smarter Web Company Unveils Ambitious LTIP Tied to Aggressive Growth and Bitcoin Strategy
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Smarter Web Company PLC ( (GB:SWC) ) has shared an update.

The Smarter Web Company PLC has launched a new long-term incentive plan after securing strong shareholder backing, granting nil-cost conditional share awards to directors and key employees that could amount to up to 3.8% of issued share capital if demanding performance milestones are met. The scheme ties vesting to a series of ten ambitious market capitalisation and share price thresholds, with awards spread over at least five years and subject to malus and clawback, in a bid to lock in talent, align management with its ten-year growth and Bitcoin treasury strategy, and signal confidence in the group’s ability to scale despite the high-risk exposure to cryptocurrency markets.

Under the plan, participants including CEO Andrew Webley and other senior managers receive awards structured per milestone, each equivalent in aggregate to 0.38% of the current share base and split evenly between market cap and share price conditions tested over rolling 30-day periods. By fully disclosing individual award levels and stressing that the milestones are not profit forecasts, the company aims to reassure investors about potential dilution, while underlining its high-growth, high-risk positioning as a web services and Bitcoin-treasury play that remains outside direct UK financial regulation and subject to the extreme volatility and structural risks of cryptoassets.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:SWC) stock is a Buy with a £100.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Smarter Web Company PLC stock, see the GB:SWC Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SWC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SWC is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by weak underlying operating performance and ongoing negative free cash flow despite a return to reported net income. A strengthened, low-leverage balance sheet provides some support, but technical indicators remain weak and valuation (P/E ~33.6 with no dividend) does not offer much cushion.

To see Spark’s full report on SWC stock, click here.

More about Smarter Web Company PLC

The Smarter Web Company PLC is a UK-based provider of web design, web development and online marketing services, generating revenue through initial project fees, annual hosting charges and optional monthly marketing subscriptions. Alongside organic expansion and selective acquisitions to build its client base and recurring income, the company has adopted a Bitcoin-focused treasury strategy, accepting Bitcoin payments since 2022 and holding surplus cash reserves in the cryptocurrency, leaving it materially exposed to Bitcoin price volatility and associated regulatory and operational risks.

Average Trading Volume: 1,660,562

Current Market Cap: £130.2M

For a thorough assessment of SWC stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: ACG Metals Sets ESG Baseline With First Sustainability Report
data.description:
Claim 55% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

ACG Metals Limited Class A ( (GB:ACG) ) has provided an announcement.

ACG Metals, a copper-focused mining company building a global high-margin portfolio, has centred its growth strategy on the Gediktepe Mine in Turkey, which is transitioning from gold-equivalent production to primary copper and zinc. The company is led by a management team with extensive M&A experience and a strong commitment to environmental, social and governance standards and corporate governance.

The company has published its first Sustainability Report for 2025, establishing a baseline for ESG data and disclosures and outlining performance across health and safety, environmental, social and governance metrics. Highlights include low lost-time injury rates, strong local employment, investment in community projects and water access, climate and biodiversity initiatives, and a zero-tolerance anti-bribery framework, with plans to enhance KPIs, align reporting with international standards and support Gediktepe’s operational transition and tailings management.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:ACG) stock is a Buy with a £19.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on ACG Metals Limited Class A stock, see the GB:ACG Stock Forecast page.

More about ACG Metals Limited Class A

ACG Metals is a copper-focused mining company aiming to build a global, high-margin producer with safe, efficient and sustainable operations. The group acquired the Gediktepe Mine in September 2024, which is shifting to primary copper and zinc production from 2026, targeting steady-state copper equivalent output of 20–25 kt after delivering 39.2 koz of gold equivalent in 2025.

Average Trading Volume: 13,761

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: £379.5M
